problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Combining Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
